CONTENT.Club career: Born in Valencia, Centelles joined Valencia CF's youth setup at the age of eight, from CF Crack's. After spending the whole 2017 pre-season with the first team, he was subsequently assigned to the reserves in Segunda División B on 2 August.Centelles made his senior debut on 20 August 2017, starting in a 2–0 away win against Deportivo Aragón. The following 24 May, after being an ever-present figure for the B-team during the campaign, he signed a new contract until 2021.On 1 July 2019, Centelles joined Primeira Liga newcomers F.C. Famalicão on loan for one year. He made his professional debut on 14 September, starting in a 4–2 home defeat of F.C. Paços de Ferreira.On 2 October 2020, Centelles signed a two-year contract with Segunda División side UD Almería.
CONTENT.Personal life: Centelles' father José was also a footballer, and also represented Valencia Mestalla.

SUMMARY: Alejandro "Álex" Centelles Plaza (born 30 August 1999) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays for UD Almería as a left back.
